versions.version_description: This tab is more friendly to beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 1


[Intro]

[ch]Fmaj7[/ch] , [ch]Am7[/ch] , [ch]Dm[/ch] , [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
I'm hurting, baby, I'm broken down, I need your loving, loving, I need it now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]  
When I'm without you, I'm something weak. You got me begging. Begging, I'm on my knees[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                [ch]Am7[/ch]             
I don't wanna be needing your love, I just wanna be deep in your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
And it's killing me when you're away. Ooh, baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Cause I really don't care where you are, I just wanna be there where you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And I gotta get one little taste[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Your sugar, Yes, please. Won't you come and put it down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'm right here, 'cause I need, little love and little sympathy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]  
Yeah you show me good loving. Make it alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Need a little sweetness in my life. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Your sugar, Yes, please. Won't you come and put it down on me[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
My broken pieces. You pick them up. Don't leave me hanging, hanging, Come give me some[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
When I'm without ya, I'm so insecure. You are the one thing. The one thing, I'm living for[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                [ch]Am7[/ch]             
I don't wanna be needing your love, I just wanna be deep in your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
And it's killing me when you're away. Ooh, baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Cause I really don't care where you are, I just wanna be there where you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And I gotta get one little taste[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Your sugar, Yes, please. Won't you come and put it down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'm right here, 'cause I need, little love and little sympathy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]  
Yeah you show me good loving. Make it alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Need a little sweetness in my life. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Your sugar, Yes, please. Won't you come and put it down on me[/tab]


[Bridge] * = strum once

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] *                  [ch]Am7[/ch] *                      [ch]Dm[/ch] *                     [ch]C[/ch] *
I want that red velvet. I want that sugar sweet, don't let nobody touch it unless that somebody's me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] *             [ch]Am7[/ch] *                     [ch]Dm[/ch] *                           [ch]C[/ch] *
I gotta be a man, there ain't no other way 'cause girl you're hotter than southern California Bay[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Am7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna play no games, I don't gotta be afraid. Don't give all that shy shit no make up on, that's my[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
Your sugar, Yes, please. Won't you come and put it down on me[/tab]
